title: The project has been disconnected from the model

posts.author: benjamin6968 (benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
In our workspace, all project boards are based on the Project Template.
Projects in the “Application Projects” folder were created using this template, but I’ve noticed they no longer appear to be linked to it—there’s no “Template Project Template” label anymore.

Everything still works fine in the an another folder.

Thanks for your help.
